query: extreme overexposure blown out highlights white sky photograph
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: exposure extremes — overexposed/blown highlights, silhouettes against white sky, washed-out high-key minimalism

response.objective_caption: A photograph of a computer monitor displaying a rectangular dialog box against a black background. The top of the dialog features a mauve header bar with the white text "Disqualification Details." Below the header, black text on a white background states submission guidelines, specifying that entries must be captured after a challenge announcement and before its deadline based on the Current Server Time in US Eastern Standard Time, that camera date and time must be set to the local time zone before shooting, and that original image file dates falling outside the specified challenge dates will result in disqualification with no exceptions. The monitor is surrounded by a thick black bezel.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A photograph of a computer monitor displaying a rectangular dialog box against a black background, with a mauve header reading "Disqualification Details" and black text on white explaining strict submission time rules and disqualification policies. Horizontal scanlines reminiscent of analog CRT or VHS interference streak across the entire display, while noticeable chromatic aberration creates purple and green color fringing along the high-contrast edges of the text, horizontal rules, and dialog borders.
